sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21139" key="bruxhth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρῡχ-ητήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n21139.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roarer</tr_>, of the constellation <title_ TEIform="title">Leo</title_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
